name: Everfall 1999
short_description: A very basic cyberpunk action game.
detailed_description:
Everfall (1999) is a cyberpunk action game set in a dystopian world on the brink of collapse. Violent gangs, chaotic environments, and a crumbling society create a dangerous backdrop as you fight your way through hostile streets.

The gameplay is simple: you run around, shoot enemies, and gather materials to unlock costumes and earn money for upgrades.

Gameplay:

While it looks like a third-person shooter, combat uses auto-aim to lock onto the nearest enemy, with options to switch targets but no manual aiming.

The camera is fixed on the Y-axis.

When you die, you lose your current loot, and you'll need to pick it up. But be careful - if you die again before reclaiming it, your lost loot will be gone for good.

Currently, the game features 3 levels:

  • A city block where you can complete quests and face enemies.

  • Farm - introduces new quest mechanics and new enemies like wild boars and malfunctioning farming equipment.

  • A hub area where you can buy new gear and upgrade your skills.

The game is pretty small and basic, so please don’t expect much.

I’m working on this project in my free time, and I created all the models and wrote all the code, so I’m really proud of it! I hope you’ll enjoy it too.


More levels may be added as development progresses, but nothing is set in stone yet.
